markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, performance, and renewal strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Performance:** Exec's AI roleplay visibility in LLMs now leads competitors (20% vs. Second Nature's 18%), driving high-value leads like a 5k+ employee demo request from ChatGPT.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** 20 articles publish next Monday, including 4 AI roleplay comparisons for `placement.com`. The SDR piece is approved for immediate launch, unblocking a waiting ad campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [**Renewal Feedback:** Exec flagged two past service gaps: slow organic ranking for core terms (e.g., "AI roleplay software") and poor communication on link-building strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [**2026 Strategy:** The renewal proposal will focus on strategic on-page SEO for new LMS/call scoring features, a refined link-building strategy, and tracking top-3 organic rankings for key BoFu terms.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Reporting

  - [**LLM Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [Exec now leads competitors in AI roleplay visibility (20% vs. Second Nature's 18%), a significant gain from a 0.6% low point in February.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [This was achieved by refining the Profound dashboard to exclude irrelevant LMS platforms, creating a cleaner, more accurate competitive view.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [**Lead Generation:**](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [A demo request from a 5k+ employee company was sourced from ChatGPT, confirming the value of LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [Comparison pages are converting: `Exec vs. BigTinkHan` generated 2 demos and 1 signup.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [GrowthX-contributed content drove 15 demos and 53 signups since August.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [New, highly specific prompts (e.g., "sales demo in SaaS") were added to Profound to test if long-tail articles rank in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Garett's Concern:** Avoid "wagging the dog" by curating prompts that artificially inflate performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [**Jo's Rationale:** The goal is to verify if high-converting long-tail content is visible in LLMs, and to enrich articles if it isn't, ensuring multi-channel discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)

### Content Pipeline & Publishing

  - [**Upcoming Launch:** 20 articles publish next Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
      - [4 AI roleplay comparison posts for `placement.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
      - [**Blocker:** CMS access for `placement.com`. Garett will confirm if it's the same Contentful instance as Exec.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [**SDR Piece:** Approved for immediate launch, unblocking a waiting ad campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**Slug Redirection:** The `software-demo-roleplay` article needs a new slug (`sales-roleplay-software`) to improve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX publishes the article with the new slug → Garett creates the redirect code → Sean implements it.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)

### Renewal & 2026 Strategy

  - [**Feedback on 2025 Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Gap 1 (Organic Ranking):** Slow progress on top-3 organic rankings for core BoFu terms (e.g., "AI roleplay software").](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
      - [**Gap 2 (Link Building):** Poor communication and lack of a clear strategy until recently.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [**2026 Renewal Proposal:**](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
      - [**Focus:** Strategic on-page SEO for new product features (LMS, call scoring).](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
      - [**Link Building:** A refined, strategic approach with clear communication.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
      - [**Reporting:** Include tracking for top-3 organic rankings on key BoFu terms.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [**Timeline:** GrowthX will present the proposal next week for discussion with Garett and Sean.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Garett:**](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)
      - [Confirm `placement.com` CMS access with Sean.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
      - [Create redirect code for the `sales-roleplay-software` slug.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Implement the 5-minute AI roleplay feature this week with Sean.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
      - [Deliver the new sales roleplay page by EOM.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)
      - [Publish the SDR piece immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [Publish the `sales-roleplay-software` article with the new slug.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
      - [Present the 2026 renewal proposal next week.](https://fathom.video/share/ikqxgGE_vQ3d_-9hPzsiZbYPm4eExVyw?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
